rows.wrapperRole: Nicaraguan wrapper gives cocoa, coffee, dark sweetness, and puro identity.
rows.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder reinforces burn, structure, and regional continuity.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler drives the rich Padron profile: cocoa, coffee, earth, and medium-full strength.
rows.flavorNotes: malted milk, cafe au lait, chocolate, coffee
rows.avoidIf: Beginner, budget-sensitive user, short time window, or user wants mild cream.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user explicitly wants the 2025 Cigar of the Year or elite Nicaraguan collector status.
rows.sourceConfidence: Cigar Aficionado 2025 Top 25 review tasting prose
rows.catalogLine: Padron 60th Anniversary · 6 × 52 · Perfecto · Full · Nicaragua · $45 · Notes: malted milk, cafe au lait, chocolate, cocoa
rows.memberBlurb: 2025 Cigar of the Year — Padron anniversary perfecto with malted milk, cafe au lait, and chocolate in a Nicaraguan puro. Collector occasion.

rows.wrapperRole: Cuban wrapper supports Cohiba elegance, oak, cream, and luxury aroma.
rows.binderRole: Cuban binder keeps the puro structure precise and integrated.
rows.fillerRole: Cuban filler provides the Cohiba core, including selected tobacco and extra fermentation character.
rows.avoidIf: User wants legal U.S. retail availability, low price, or beginner mildness.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the request centers on Cuban prestige, rarity, and polished luxury flavor.
rows.sourceConfidence: Cigar Aficionado 2025 Top 25 review tasting prose
rows.catalogLine: The Cohiba Ambar · 5¼ × 53 · Ambar · Medium-Full · Cuban · — · Notes: oak, caramel, almond, cream
rows.memberBlurb: CA 2025 #2 — barrel-fermented Cohiba in the new 53-ring Ambar size. Oak and caramel core, creamy almond, elegant fruit finish; pigtail cap nods to the original Lancero.
rows.priceNote: Island Cuban; not U.S. retail MSRP. UK reference ~£75/stick (~$95) for prestige context only.

rows.wrapperRole: Nicaraguan wrapper concentrates sweetness, oak, and rustic farm-roll character.
rows.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder keeps the narrow format burning with focused flavor.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler delivers compact but intense Tatuaje/My Father character.
rows.avoidIf: User wants mild cream, large ring gauge comfort, or low flavor intensity.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user has less time but still wants serious boutique flavor.
rows.sourceConfidence: Cigar Aficionado 2025 Top 25 review tasting prose
rows.catalogLine: Tatuaje Black · 6 × 38 · Petite Lancero · Medium · Nicaragua · $11 · Notes: smores, campfire sweetness, oak, tannin
rows.memberBlurb: Big flavor in a slim ring — campfire smores, oak, and Tatuaje intensity when you only have 45 minutes. Boutique density over size.

rows.displayName: Cuesta-Rey Centro Fino Sungrown Pyramid No. 9
rows.wrapperRole: Ecuadorian Sungrown wrapper adds spice, sweetness, and richer color to a Dominican core.
rows.binderRole: Dominican binder supports Fuente-made construction and steady burn.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican filler keeps the profile rooted in classic Dominican balance with added sungrown force.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner looking for ultra mild smoke or user dislikes sungrown spice.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend for a Dominican region lesson that is richer than basic foundation cigars.
rows.sourceConfidence: Cigar Aficionado 2025 Top 25 review tasting prose

rows.displayName: Arturo Fuente Opus X Angel's Share
rows.wrapperRole: Dominican wrapper is the core achievement, adding spice, sweetness, and estate-grown rarity.
rows.binderRole: Dominican binder keeps the puro structure elegant and Fuente-like.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican filler provides cedar, spice, fruit, and OpusX complexity.
rows.flavorNotes: licorice, wood, baking spices, leather, honey, red pepper
rows.bestFor: Celebration, cognac, experienced smoker wanting OpusX rarity without standard OpusX pepper bomb.
rows.avoidIf: User wants full body, maximum strength, bold espresso pairing, or a powerhouse smoke — Angel's Share is a softer, cream-forward OpusX sub-line, not standard OpusX strength.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user wants OpusX prestige with a sweeter, cream-forward profile — not maximum strength or bold bitter coffee.
rows.sourceConfidence: Cigar Aficionado 2025 Top 25 review tasting prose
